channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Trump Is Reportedly Going Full Steam Ahead with the Golden Dome
item.description: A Bloomberg report provides a rare glimpse into the timeline for Trump's super secret and disputed project.

item.title: Polymarket took down wagers tied to rescue of downed Air Force officer
item.description: A Democratic congressman had harsh criticism for Polymarket for allowing users to bet on the date the U.S. would confirm the rescue of Air Force service members shot down over Iran.

item.title: '30,000 drones a year': African start-up looks to emulate Ukrainian UAV revolution by taking a leaf out of Apple's playbook
item.description: Terra Industries is expanding drone deployments across Africa using in-house production and subscriptions.

item.title: ‘Kamen Rider’ Is Ready to Take on the World
item.description: New movies, new shows, *and* weekly drops for two legacy series? 'Kamen Rider' fans have a lot to look forward to for its big birthday.

item.title: Grindr for lesbians? Here are the best dating apps for LGBTQ women.
item.description: Looking for love, friends, or casual fun? We've curated a list of the best dating apps for lesbians, from HER to Hinge.

item.title: Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use
item.description: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

item.title: Twitter Just Can’t Stop Leaking Movies
item.description: If you're still hanging around on Twitter, you've probably seen 'Avatar 3' and 'The Super Mario Galaxy' leaks on there. Second verse...
